data.raceComments: {"comment":"9. DOROTHEA is a recent addition to the David Walsh stable, and she makes her South Island debut after last being seen at Hawera just over 3 weeks ago, where she finished a fair fifth. This is easier, and with the aid of a 3kg claim, she is the one to beat. 2. LADY MELL has tried hard in her last couple of starts off a pair of wide gates at Wingatui, and she has top 3 claims from a superior gate this time. Stick with her. 10. EMERGING MISS will be peaking third up from a spell, and her first 2 starts have not been too bad for a race like this. Include in all top 4 combos. 11. VOGUISH was beaten by less than 2 lengths when finishing fourth at Hawera nearly 7 weeks ago. She makes her South Island debut for the leading Pitman stable, and despite copping a wide gate, she is still worth including in all top 4 combos. 7. MOONLIGHTING battled on well for sixth fresh, and she will improve further with racing. Include in all top 4 combinations.","runners":[9,2,10,11,7],"exclusive":true}
